accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately reflect the War Powers Resolution context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; details match the bill's findings and provisions.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose: directing removal of U.S. forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly references the War Powers Resolution and expedited procedures under existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately captures the rule of construction carve-outs and the declaration/authorization conditions.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 60-day deadline ending May 1, 2026, and the notification/initiation dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the removal directive and all four rule-of-construction exceptions faithfully.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and non-partisan throughout, with no editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across all paragraphs.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the War Powers Resolution, Congress, the President, Iran, and Israel.

correct_figures.why: Dates (March 2, Feb 28, May 1, 2026) and the 60-day period are all stated correctly.
